name: Meepo
description: All these fancy knights and scary monsters. Pff! What do they got that I ain't got? Nothing, that's what.

abilities.name: Earthbind
abilities.description: Mega Meepo throws out multiple nets at the same time. Cast Range: 750/900/1050/1200. Radius: 220. Duration: 2. Net Bonus per Meepo Stacked: (1). Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Poof
abilities.description: A Meepo can teleport to another Meepo or itself after its cast point, dealing damage in both the departure and arrival locations. Poof deals bonus damage corresponding to the amount of Meepo stacked. Cast Range: Global. Radius: 400. Damage: 50/80/110/140 (90/120/150/180). Damage Factor per Meepo Stacked: (0.5). Cooldown: 12/10/8/6. Mana Cost: 80.

abilities.name: Ransack
abilities.description: Steals health from the attacked enemy target per strike and heals all other Meepos for a fixed amount. Effect Radius: Global Damage: 9/12/15/18 (16/19/22/25). Lifesteal: 9/12/15/18 (16/19/22/25). Effect Radius: Global. Damage: 9/12/15/18 (16/19/22/25). Creep Lifesteal Factor: 0.6.

abilities.name: Dig
abilities.description: Dispels Meepo, becomes invulnerable and hidden shortly, while restoring its health. Max Health Restore: 25%. Duration: 3. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Mega Meepo
abilities.description: Mega Meepo throws out multiple nets at the same time. Poof deals bonus damage corresponding to the amount of Meepo stacked. Meepo Search Radius: 600. Shared Attribute Factor: 0.5. Duration: 25. Net Bonus per Meepo Stacked: 1. Damage Factor per Meepo Stacked: 0.5. Mana Cost: 60.

abilities.name: Divided We Stand
abilities.description: Summons an imperfect, semi-autonomous duplicate of himself, which can gain gold and experience as he does Number of Clones: 1/2/3/4. Current Health as Damage: 100%.

abilities.name: Clone Model
abilities.description: The Meepo Clones are treated as heroes in most cases with certain exceptions.

abilities.name: Clone Inventory
abilities.description: The Clones recognizes and copy Boots of Speed-based items with a certain priority. However, they still cannot utilize active item abilities by design.
